title: grewia flava
intro: Grewia flava, also known as the Yellow Grewia or Yellow Mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. Traditionally, Grewia flava has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating skin conditions like eczema. In herbal preparations, Grewia flava can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
